name: igh_locus_chr12
description: Zebrafish IGH locus on chr12. Contains VH (~40 functional), DH, JH, then Cμ (IGHM), Cδ (IGHD), Cζ (IGHZ — teleost-specific isotype, dimeric). No IgG, IgA, IgE — these mammalian isotypes evolved after divergence.. Zebrafish Ig isotypes (IgM/IgD/IgZ) differ from mammalian. Intra-cluster paralog identity 70-95% in V segments; PSVs are essential for correct V-gene assignment.
expected_copy_count: 1 locus, VDJ-rearranged per B cell; ~40-50 VH/VL gene segments
